mechanics.excerpt: For example doctor needs more than Career /Doctor in order t0 practice medicine would also need First Aid MedTech Surgery and other skills In many cases_ the occupational fields 52) offer guidance on these requirements The final arbiter these cases is always the gamemaster; As rule 0t thumb there is an appropriate skill to profession on the Skill List, character must have it to be considered professional.
